# TON Center Python SDK

> Python SDK for the TON Center API — read blockchain data, query smart contracts, send transactions, and subscribe to real-time events over SSE and WebSocket. Python 3.10+, runtime deps: aiohttp 3.9+, pydantic 2.4+.

Install: `pip install toncenter`. API key is optional for REST (~1 RPS without key), required for streaming. Get a key from the [@toncenter](https://t.me/toncenter) Telegram bot.

Networks: `Network.MAINNET` (toncenter.com), `Network.TESTNET` (testnet.toncenter.com).

The SDK has three transports:

- **REST V2** — direct liteserver queries via tonlib. Exact, real-time data. No pagination. Best for: current account state, sending transactions, running smart contract get-methods.
- **REST V3** — indexed PostgreSQL database. Pagination, filters, time ranges. Best for: historical queries, actions/traces, Jetton/NFT analytics, batch lookups.
- **Streaming** — real-time subscriptions via SSE (simpler, single POST) or WebSocket (bidirectional, dynamic subscribe/unsubscribe). Both transports multiplex all subscriptions over a single connection.

Client: `ToncenterRestClient` (async context manager) exposes `client.v2` and `client.v3` resource groups. Streaming: `ToncenterSSE` and `ToncenterWebSocket` with decorator-based handler registration (`@client.on_transactions()`, `@client.on_actions()`, etc.) and finality filtering. Automatic retries with exponential backoff for 429/500/502/503/504 (542 excluded). Client-side rate limiter via `rps_limit`. Pass `ApiKey` objects with per-key rate limits (`api_key=[ApiKey("k1", rps_limit=10), ApiKey("k2", rps_limit=25)]`) for key rotation on 429. Streaming accepts `list[str]` for key rotation on connection limit.

Import paths:

```python
from toncenter.rest import ToncenterRestClient
from toncenter.types import Network, Workchain, ApiKey, RetryPolicy, RetryRule, ReconnectPolicy
from toncenter.streaming import ToncenterSSE, ToncenterWebSocket, Finality, ActionType, EventType
from toncenter.utils import raw_to_userfriendly, userfriendly_to_raw, to_nano, to_amount
from toncenter.exceptions import ToncenterError
```

## Docs

- [Overview](https://toncenter.ness.su/index.md): Installation, quick start, networks, API key plans.
- [Reference](https://toncenter.ness.su/reference.md): Client configuration, sessions, retries, utilities, error handling.

## API V2

Direct liteserver queries — real-time account state, blocks, transactions, contract execution.

- [API V2 Overview](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/overview.md): Resource groups, SDK usage, endpoints.
- [API V2 Models](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/models.md): Pydantic model reference for all V2 response types.
- [Get Address Information](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_address_information_get.md): Full account state including balance, code, and data.
- [Get Extended Address Information](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_extended_address_information_get.md): Extended account state with last transaction info.
- [Get Wallet Information](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_wallet_information_get.md): Wallet-specific state — type, seqno, balance.
- [Get Address Balance](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_address_balance_get.md): Account balance in nanotons.
- [Get Address State](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_address_state_get.md): Account status — active, uninitialized, or frozen.
- [Get Token Data](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_token_data_get.md): Jetton/NFT token metadata from on-chain.
- [Get Masterchain Info](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_masterchain_info_get.md): Current masterchain block and state.
- [Get Masterchain Block Signatures](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_masterchain_block_signatures_get.md): Validator signatures for a masterchain block.
- [Get Shard Block Proof](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_shard_block_proof_get.md): Merkle proof for a shard block.
- [Get Consensus Block](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_consensus_block_get.md): Latest consensus block info.
- [Lookup Block](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/lookup_block_get.md): Find a block by workchain, shard, and seqno or time.
- [Get Shards](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_shards_get.md): Shard configuration at a given masterchain block.
- [Get Block Header](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_block_header_get.md): Block header with metadata.
- [Get Out Msg Queue Size](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_out_msg_queue_size_get.md): Outbound message queue size.
- [Get Block Transactions](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_block_transactions_get.md): Transaction IDs in a block.
- [Get Block Transactions Ext](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_block_transactions_ext_get.md): Full transaction data in a block.
- [Get Transactions](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_transactions_get.md): Transaction history for an address.
- [Get Transactions Std](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_transactions_std_get.md): Transaction history with standardized addresses.
- [Try Locate Tx](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/try_locate_tx_get.md): Locate a transaction by address and logical time.
- [Try Locate Result Tx](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/try_locate_result_tx_get.md): Locate the result transaction of an outbound message.
- [Try Locate Source Tx](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/try_locate_source_tx_get.md): Locate the source transaction of an inbound message.
- [Get Config Param](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_config_param_get.md): Single network configuration parameter.
- [Get Config All](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_config_all_get.md): Full network configuration.
- [Get Libraries](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/get_libraries_get.md): TVM library cells by hash.
- [Run Get Method](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/run_get_method_post.md): Execute a smart contract get-method.
- [Run Get Method Std](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/run_get_method_std_post.md): Execute a get-method with standardized address output.
- [Send Boc](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/send_boc_post.md): Send a signed serialized BOC to the network.
- [Send Boc Return Hash](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/send_boc_return_hash_post.md): Send a signed BOC and return its hash.
- [Estimate Fee](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/estimate_fee_post.md): Estimate transaction fees before sending.
- [Detect Address](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/detect_address_get.md): Detect address format and return all forms.
- [Detect Hash](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/detect_hash_get.md): Detect encoding of a hash string.
- [Pack Address](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/pack_address_get.md): Convert raw address to user-friendly format.
- [Unpack Address](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/unpack_address_get.md): Convert user-friendly address to raw format.
- [Json Rpc](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v2/json_rpc_post.md): JSON-RPC interface for all V2 methods.

## API V3

Indexed database queries — historical data, traces, Jettons, NFTs, batch lookups.

- [API V3 Overview](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/overview.md): Resource groups, SDK usage, endpoints.
- [API V3 Models](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/models.md): Pydantic model reference for all V3 response types.
- [Get Account States](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/account_states_get.md): Historical account states with filters.
- [Get Address Book](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/address_book_get.md): Address book entries for known contracts.
- [Get Metadata](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/metadata_get.md): On-chain metadata for accounts.
- [Get Wallet States](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/wallet_states_get.md): Wallet states with seqno and balance history.
- [Get Actions](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/actions_get.md): Parsed high-level actions (transfers, swaps, etc.).
- [Get Pending Actions](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/pending_actions_get.md): Actions not yet finalized.
- [Get Pending Traces](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/pending_traces_get.md): Traces not yet finalized.
- [Get Traces](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/traces_get.md): Full execution traces with transaction trees.
- [Get Masterchain Info](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/masterchain_info_get.md): First and last indexed block in the database.
- [Get Blocks](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/blocks_get.md): Block data with filters and pagination.
- [Get Masterchain Block Shards](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/masterchain_block_shards_get.md): Workchain blocks that appeared after the previous masterchain block.
- [Get Masterchain Block Shard State](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/masterchain_block_shard_state_get.md): Shard state at a given masterchain block. Same as V2 /api/v2/shards.
- [Get Transactions](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/transactions_get.md): Transactions with filters, pagination, and sorting.
- [Get Transactions By Masterchain Block](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/transactions_by_masterchain_block_get.md): All transactions in a masterchain block and its shards.
- [Get Transactions By Message](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/transactions_by_message_get.md): Transactions whose inbound/outbound message has the specified hash.
- [Get Adjacent Transactions](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/adjacent_transactions_get.md): Parent and child transactions for a given transaction.
- [Get Messages](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/messages_get.md): Messages with filters and pagination.
- [Get Pending Transactions](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/pending_transactions_get.md): Transactions not yet finalized.
- [Get Jetton Masters](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/jetton_masters_get.md): Jetton master contracts with metadata.
- [Get Jetton Wallets](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/jetton_wallets_get.md): Jetton wallet balances for addresses.
- [Get Jetton Transfers](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/jetton_transfers_get.md): Jetton transfer history with filters.
- [Get Jetton Burns](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/jetton_burns_get.md): Jetton burn events.
- [Get NFT Collections](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/nft_collections_get.md): NFT collection contracts with metadata.
- [Get NFT Items](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/nft_items_get.md): Individual NFT items with ownership and metadata.
- [Get NFT Sales](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/nft_sales_get.md): GetGems NFT sales and auctions by contract address.
- [Get NFT Transfers](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/nft_transfers_get.md): NFT transfer history.
- [Get DNS Records](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/dns_records_get.md): TON DNS records for a domain. Supports .ton and .t.me domains.
- [Get Multisig Wallets](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/multisig_wallets_get.md): Multisig wallet contracts with associated orders.
- [Get Multisig Orders](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/multisig_orders_get.md): Pending multisig orders.
- [Get Vesting Contracts](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/vesting_get.md): Vesting contract states.
- [Get Top Accounts By Balance](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/top_accounts_by_balance_get.md): Accounts ranked by balance.
- [Get Decode](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/decode_get.md): Decode opcode or message body. Opcodes in hex or decimal, bodies in base64 or hex.
- [Post Decode](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/decode_post.md): Decode opcode or message body via POST for long parameters.
- [Get Address Information](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/address_information_get.md): V2-style address info via V3 endpoint.
- [Get Wallet Information](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/wallet_information_get.md): V2-style wallet info via V3 endpoint. Supported wallets: v1r1, v1r2, v1r3, v2r1, v2r2, v3r1, v3r2, v4r1, v4r2, v5beta, v5r1. Returns 409 if account is not a wallet.
- [Estimate Fee](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/estimate_fee_post.md): V2-style fee estimation via V3 endpoint. Fields body, init-code, and init-data in b64-encoded format.
- [Send Message](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/message_post.md): Send a signed BOC via V3 endpoint.
- [Run Get Method](https://toncenter.ness.su/api_v3/run_get_method_post.md): Execute a smart contract get-method via V3 endpoint. Stack supports num, cell, and slice types.

## Streaming

Real-time blockchain events over SSE and WebSocket.

- [Streaming Overview](https://toncenter.ness.su/streaming/overview.md): SSE and WebSocket transports, endpoints, SDK usage.
- [Client](https://toncenter.ness.su/streaming/client.md): Constructor parameters, start, and stop methods.
- [Handlers](https://toncenter.ness.su/streaming/handlers.md): Decorator API for registering event handlers with finality filtering.
- [Events](https://toncenter.ness.su/streaming/events.md): Finality levels, notification models, and action types.
- [Connection](https://toncenter.ness.su/streaming/connection.md): Connection state, reconnect policy, dynamic subscription management.

## OpenAPI Specifications

- [V2 OpenAPI Spec](https://toncenter.ness.su/openapi/v2.yaml): Full OpenAPI 3.1 specification for V2 REST API.
- [V3 OpenAPI Spec](https://toncenter.ness.su/openapi/v3.yaml): Full OpenAPI 3.1 specification for V3 REST API.

## AI Plugin

- [Claude Code Plugin](https://github.com/nessshon/toncenter/tree/main/skills/toncenter): Install with `/plugin marketplace add nessshon/claude-plugins` then `/plugin install toncenter@nessshon-plugins`. Routing table, CLI runner for executing SDK methods, and per-resource API references for code generation.

## Optional

- [Source Code](https://github.com/nessshon/toncenter): GitHub repository.
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/toncenter/): Package registry — `pip install toncenter`.

Built with [Mintlify](https://mintlify.com).
